class "ITriangulator" as ITriangulator {
}
class "Incremental" as Incremental {
+ Triangulate(points:IList<Vertex>, config:Configuration) : IMesh
+ GetBoundingBox() : void
+ RemoveBox() : int
}
class "Mesh" as Mesh {
}
ITriangulator <|-- Incremental
Incremental --> Mesh : mesh
@enduml
